ceiling_fan.title: Choose a ceiling fan
ceiling_fan.description:
Choose a ceiling fan to control.

If you need help with the configuration have a look here: {github_url}

ceiling_fan_options.title: Configure {controlled_entity}
ceiling_fan_options.description:
Automate a ceiling fan for comfort using the summer simmer index (SSI) as the comfort level. {ssi_url}

If you need help with the configuration have a look here: {github_url}

data.temp_sensor: Temperature sensor in the same room as the fan to be controlled:
data.humidity_sensor: Humidity sensor in the same room as the fan to be controlled:
data.ssi_min: Fan will start when SSI is above:
data.ssi_max: Fan speed will be maximum speed when SSI above:
data.required_on_entities: The following sensors must all be 'on' for occupancy to be detected (optional):
data.required_off_entities: The following sensors must all be 'off' for occupancy to be detected (optional):

light.title: Choose a light
light.description:
Choose a light to control.

If you need help with the configuration have a look here: {github_url}

light_options.title: Configure {controlled_entity}
light_options.description:
Automate a light based on illuminancy and required states. Everything is optional.

If you need help with the configuration have a look here: {github_url}

data.required_on_entities: The following sensors must all be 'on' for the light to be automatically turned on (optional):
data.required_off_entities: The following sensors must all be 'off' for the light to be automatically turned on (optional):

occupancy.title: Configure occupancy sensor
occupancy.description:
Create a room occupancy controller using trigger entities and sustain entities. The name you enter is used for the controller device and the primary occupancy sensor.

Trigger entities START occupancy. Use PIR or motion-style entities that should make the room occupied when they turn on. When any trigger entities are configured, only those triggers can start occupancy.

Sustain entities KEEP occupancy active. Use mmWave, presence, BLE, media, computer/activity, or other on/off entities that should prove the room is still occupied. If no trigger entities are configured, any sustain entity turning on will start occupancy and occupancy turns off when all sustain entities are off.

If trigger entities are configured without sustain entities, set a decay time so occupancy can turn off after the last trigger.

If you need help with the configuration have a look here: {github_url}

data.trigger_entities: Trigger entities (optional): start occupancy when one turns on. Best for PIR/motion sensors. If any triggers are configured, sustain entities cannot start occupancy while vacant:
data.decay_minutes: Trigger-only decay time (required only when no sustain entities are configured):
data.sustain_entities: Sustain entities (optional): keep occupancy active while any are on. Best for mmWave/presence/BLE/media/activity entities. If no triggers are configured, sustains also start occupancy:
data.required_on_entities: Required ON entities (optional): all must be on for occupancy to start or remain active:
data.required_off_entities: Required OFF entities (optional): all must be off for occupancy to start or remain active:

error.duplicate_name: An integration with the same name already exists.
error.occupancy_and_auto_off: Occupancy sensor and automatic off cannot be used together.
error.occupancy_needs_entity: Specify at least one trigger entity or sustain entity.
error.trigger_only_needs_minutes: Trigger-only occupancy requires a decay time because no sustain entities are configured.

abort.nothing_to_control: No entities are available to control
